mapper.select: SELECT param_id, param_code, param_name, param_value, currency, trade_type, description, updated_at FROM fx_margin_param ORDER BY param_code
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_margin_param SET param_name = #{paramName}, param_value = #{paramValue}, currency = #{currency}, trade_type = #{tradeType}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE param_id = #{paramId}
